assertions.expectation: Identifies this as an admission webhook compatibility issue — the webhook is rejecting pod creation requests
assertions.reason: Response clearly identifies that cert-manager's admission webhook wasn't updated to support Kubernetes 1.32 APIs, causing it to reject pod creation requests from the upgraded control plane

assertions.expectation: Provides commands to identify the problematic webhook (kubectl get validatingwebhookconfigurations / mutatingwebhookconfigurations)
assertions.reason: Response includes 'kubectl get validatingwebhookconfigurations' command to list and identify cert-manager webhooks

assertions.expectation: Offers an immediate fix: temporarily disable or remove the problematic webhook
assertions.reason: Response provides immediate mitigation by patching the webhook to set failurePolicy to 'Ignore'

assertions.expectation: Provides the kubectl delete command for the webhook configuration as emergency mitigation
assertions.reason: Response includes 'kubectl delete validatingwebhookconfigurations cert-manager-webhook' as a last resort option

assertions.expectation: Warns that deleting the webhook removes validation — it's a temporary fix
assertions.reason: Response clearly indicates this as 'temporary' and 'last resort' and emphasizes this is immediate mitigation before permanent fix

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking cert-manager version compatibility with Kubernetes 1.32
assertions.reason: Response includes section to 'Check cert-manager version compatibility' with commands to check current version and verify compatibility

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading cert-manager to a version that supports 1.30 as the permanent fix
assertions.reason: Response provides Helm upgrade command to cert-manager v1.15.3 as the permanent fix for 1.32 compatibility

assertions.expectation: Mentions setting failurePolicy to Ignore as a less drastic alternative to deletion
assertions.reason: Response uses failurePolicy: Ignore as the primary immediate mitigation approach before suggesting deletion as last resort

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to verify pods can be created after the fix
assertions.reason: Response includes multiple 'kubectl run test-pod' commands to verify pod creation works after mitigation and after permanent fix

assertions.expectation: Notes that any webhook configuration changes (failurePolicy, cert-manager version) must be persisted in the source of truth (Helm chart, GitOps manifests, CI/CD pipeline) to survive redeployment
assertions.reason: Response does not mention persisting changes to source of truth like Helm charts, GitOps manifests, or CI/CD pipelines

assertions.expectation: Qualifies failurePolicy: Ignore as a temporary debugging measure with explicit risks, recommending revert to Fail after the root cause is resolved
assertions.reason: Response explicitly shows reverting failurePolicy back to 'Fail' after the permanent fix is applied and tested, indicating it's temporary
